attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
STG.UPPER_USER_EMAIL, 
STG.USER_TPE, 
STG.ROLE_ID, 
STG.ROLE_NAME, 
STG.APPLICATION_ID, 
STG.HIERARCHY_LEVEL, 
STG.DISTRIBUTOR_ID, 
STG.RESELLER_ID, 
STG.ENDUSER_ID, 
STG.STATUS, 
STG.CREATED_BY, 
STG.CREATE_DATE, 
STG.UPDATED_BY, 
STG.UPDATE_DATE, 
STG.ACTION_CODE, 
STG.BATCH_ID, 
STG.CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_DISTRIBUTOR_HIER STG
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (STG.APPLICATION_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON STG.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.cco_id = STG.UPPER_USER_EMAIL 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON STG.APPLICATION_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSCC_SMS3_DISTI_LINK ECSDL
ON STG.DISTRIBUTOR_ID=CAST(ECSDL.CSCC_DISTRIBUTOR_ID AS VARCHAR(100))
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR SMS3
ON COALESCE(ECSDL.SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR_ID,STG.DISTRIBUTOR_ID)=SMS3.BK_SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR_ID
WHERE STG.HIERARCHY_LEVEL =1 AND (IAC.TOOL_ID IS NULL OR NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NULL  OR NIU.cco_id IS NULL OR SMS3.BK_SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR_ID IS NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
STG.UPPER_USER_EMAIL, 
STG.USER_TPE, 
STG.ROLE_ID, 
STG.ROLE_NAME, 
STG.APPLICATION_ID, 
STG.HIERARCHY_LEVEL, 
STG.DISTRIBUTOR_ID, 
STG.RESELLER_ID, 
STG.ENDUSER_ID, 
STG.STATUS, 
STG.CREATED_BY, 
STG.CREATE_DATE, 
STG.UPDATED_BY, 
STG.UPDATE_DATE, 
STG.ACTION_CODE, 
STG.BATCH_ID, 
STG.CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_DISTRIBUTOR_HIER STG
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (STG.APPLICATION_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON STG.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.cco_id = STG.UPPER_USER_EMAIL 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON STG.APPLICATION_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
WHERE STG.HIERARCHY_LEVEL =0 AND (IAC.TOOL_ID IS NULL OR NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NULL  OR NIU.cco_id IS NULL)

SELECT
SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
SMS3.SMS3_REPORTED_DISTRIBUTOR_KEY as SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
 '=' AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
 '=' AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN SIEURTH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
 WHEN  SIEURTH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' END  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SIEURTH.HIERARCHY_LEVEL AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'I'	ACTION_CODE,
'I'  DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT  ROLE_NAME, STATUS,HIERARCHY_LEVEL, APPLICATION_ID,  UPPER_USER_EMAIL, DISTRIBUTOR_ID FROM
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_DISTRIBUTOR_HIER 
UNION 
SELECT  ROLE_NAME, STATUS,HIERARCHY_LEVEL, APPLICATION_ID, UPPER_USER_EMAIL, DISTRIBUTOR_ID FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_IAM_EDWTD_DISTRIBUTOR_HIER ) SIEURTH

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SIEURTH.APPLICATION_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.cco_id = SIEURTH.UPPER_USER_EMAIL 

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIEURTH.APPLICATION_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSCC_SMS3_DISTI_LINK ECSDL
ON SIEURTH.DISTRIBUTOR_ID=CAST(ECSDL.CSCC_DISTRIBUTOR_ID AS VARCHAR(100))

INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR SMS3
ON COALESCE(ECSDL.SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR_ID,SIEURTH.DISTRIBUTOR_ID) =SMS3.BK_SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR_ID  

where SIEURTH.HIERARCHY_LEVEL=1

UNION ALL

SELECT
SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
-999 as SMS3_DISTRIBUTOR_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
 '=' AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
 '=' AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN SIEURTH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
 WHEN  SIEURTH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' END  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SIEURTH.HIERARCHY_LEVEL AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'I'	ACTION_CODE,
'I'  DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT  ROLE_NAME, STATUS,HIERARCHY_LEVEL, APPLICATION_ID,  UPPER_USER_EMAIL, DISTRIBUTOR_ID FROM
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_DISTRIBUTOR_HIER 
UNION 
SELECT  ROLE_NAME, STATUS,HIERARCHY_LEVEL, APPLICATION_ID, UPPER_USER_EMAIL, DISTRIBUTOR_ID FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_IAM_EDWTD_DISTRIBUTOR_HIER ) SIEURTH

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SIEURTH.APPLICATION_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.cco_id = SIEURTH.UPPER_USER_EMAIL 

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIEURTH.APPLICATION_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT  WHERE
SIEURTH.HIERARCHY_LEVEL=0
